title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hubtown - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Hubtown - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Hubtown in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hubtown:
Hubtown is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hubtown!
